servers.name: evofaceflow-prod
servers.note: Lightsail instance name still 'evofaceflow-prod' (pre-AnimationStation brand). Co-hosts TryOn; TryOn's nginx owns :80/:443.

servers.name: evofaceflow-dev
servers.note: Lightsail instance name still 'evofaceflow-dev'. Co-hosts TryOn.

servers.name: bruhnfreeman-com
servers.note: Personal Lightsail box. Hosts bruhnfreeman.com plus other apps (Merlin, NaturalBliss, bizcardscan) behind a dockerized Caddy. The old animationstation deployment here was decommissioned 2026-07-02 (volumes retained). NOT part of the AnimationStation dev/prod flow - inventory only.
